_meta.description: Verified BMFFFL champion records 2016-2025. ESPN era (2016-2019) confirmed via ESPN leagueHistory API (league 945797). Sleeper era (2020-2025) verified from Sleeper SQLite DB (bimfle-data/sleeper.db). All championship game scores now confirmed from live API data.
_meta.validationStatus: VERIFIED — all champion records and championship scores confirmed from live API sources
_meta.note: All championship scores now filled in. ESPN era via ESPN v3 API. Sleeper era via matchups table (week 17, matchup_id 1 = championship game).

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED via ESPN leagueHistory API (league 945797, season 2016). Week 16 WINNERS_BRACKET: Murder Boners 156.0 def. El Rioux Grandes 136.6.
champions.notes: MLSchools12's first championship. 11-2 regular season. ESPN era.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED via ESPN leagueHistory API (league 945797, season 2017). Week 16 WINNERS_BRACKET: Team Cogdeill 109.3 def. Arnie's Army 89.5.
champions.notes: Cogdeill11's first championship. 7-6 regular season — won as lower seed. ESPN era.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED via ESPN v3 API (league 945797, season 2018). Week 16 WINNERS_BRACKET: Stand Against Trade Rape 138.66 def. The Murder Boners 106.80.
champions.notes: Mike Vieyra (SexMachineAndyD/vieyramf) won as 9-4 regular season finisher. ESPN era. Left league before Sleeper migration.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED via ESPN v3 API (league 945797, season 2019). Week 16 WINNERS_BRACKET: The Murder Boners 197.98 def. Really Big Rings 164.24.
champions.notes: MLSchools12's second championship. 12-1 regular season — dominant. ESPN era. Last season before moving to Sleeper.

champions.notablePlayer: Alvin Kamara (6 TDs on Christmas Day)
champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — confirmed from Sleeper DB matchups + multiple internal sources
champions.notes: Narrowest championship margin in league history (4.76 pts). Alvin Kamara's Christmas Day performance decided the title.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — confirmed from Sleeper DB matchups table (week 17, matchup_id=1, roster 5 vs roster 2). Score: 193.10-111.34.
champions.notes: Largest championship margin in league history (81.76 pts). MLSchools12's third career championship (first Sleeper-era). CMC anchor.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — confirmed from Sleeper DB matchups table (week 17, matchup_id=1, roster 1 vs roster 3). Score: 137.82-115.08.
champions.notes: Grandes won as 4th seed in a three-way 10-4 tie season. Won semifinal over MLSchools12 by 2.80 points. rbr was runner-up for 2nd consecutive year.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — confirmed from Sleeper DB matchups table (week 17, matchup_id=1, roster 8 vs roster 7). Score: 179.40-149.62.
champions.notes: JuicyBussy won as 6th seed — lowest-seeded champion in BMFFFL history. 13-1 MLSchools12 lost in semis (200.82 pts in a loss).

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — confirmed from Sleeper DB matchups table (week 17, matchup_id=1, roster 5 vs roster 2). Score: 168.40-146.86.
champions.notes: MLSchools12's fourth career championship (second Sleeper-era). Won from 3rd seed. Tubes94 went 11-3 but lost in semis.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — confirmed from Sleeper DB matchups table (week 17, matchup_id=1, roster 11 vs roster 12). Score: 152.92-135.08. 3rd place: MLSchools12 90.68 def. maleskcr1 89.74 (0.94 pt margin — narrowest game on record).
champions.notes: tdtd19844 won as 4th seed, matching Grandes' 2022 upset. 13-1 MLSchools12 lost in semis for the second time. Narrowest game in BMFFFL history: 3rd place decided by 0.94 pts.

validationSummary.internalConsistency: All 10 champion claims verified from live API sources (ESPN API for 2016-2019, Sleeper DB for 2020-2025)
validationSummary.pattern: 4th-seed upsets: Grandes (2022) and tdtd19844 (2025). MLSchools12 dominates all-time with 4 championships (2016, 2019, 2021, 2024).
